subject: Fw: List for JE
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: "Jermaine Ruan" <jruan@nysgmail.com>

Date: Thu, 3 Jan 2008 08:29:13 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: List for JE


List of upbeat Churches: 
  
Saturday: 
Agapi “Seven Day” Church          
Praise Service   11:00am            Bolongo Bay      Yellow ‘A’ style structure before the bowling alley 
Large Membership (over 60) 
  
Sunday: 
Trinity Baptist Church (This is the my church) 
            Praise Service   11:00am            Bolongo Bay      White Structure 2 lots before the bowling alley 
            Very small membership (less than 20) 
  
Community Baptist Church 
            Praise Services  11:00 am           Smith Bay         White Small structure across from Sugarbay resort 
            Medium Membership (20 – 40) 
  
Living Hope Cathedral 
            Praise Services  10:00 am           Charlotte Amalie            Palms Court Harbor View Second Floor Ball Room 
            Medium-Large Membership (40 – 70)
